utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I am so bored ! Stupid rain , we ... we can not do anything .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , I have brought some books . We could read .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , it has not come to that yet .

emotion_cause.span: 3_it has not come to that yet .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey hey hey ! Do not mind if I do !

utterances.speaker: Waiter
utterances.text: I am sorry sir , these are for the pharmaceutical convention

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey Rach , do you feel like going to a convention ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: We can not . We are not pharmacists !

emotion_cause.span: 7_We can not . We are not pharmacists !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I know we are not , but Frank Medeio and ... Eva Trorro ... womba ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: And ... that is the most sex I am gonna have this weekend .

emotion_cause.span: 11_that is the most sex I am gonna have this weekend .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: In that case should I make sure it is on real good ?
